description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named CI that runs on push, pull request, and a monthly schedule. The workflow should have two jobs: build-linux and build-windows, each running on ubuntu-latest and windows-latest respectively. Both jobs should use a matrix strategy to build with Release and Debug configurations. For each job, check out the repository, fetch submodules, install Rust, generate a build system with CMake, build the project, and upload the resulting artifact.
